title: Junior UX Designer
description: Elastic is hiring a Junior UX Designer to help shape the user experience of our search and analytics platform. You'll work with product managers and engineers to design intuitive interfaces, conduct user research, and iterate based on feedback. This hybrid role offers mentorship from experienced designers and the chance to impact millions of users globally.
responsibilities: Design user interfaces and user flows for new features and products
Create wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes using Figma
Conduct user research, usability testing, and gather feedback on designs
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on design implementation
Document design decisions and maintain design systems and component libraries

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Design, HCI, or related field; or equivalent portfolio demonstrating design skills
skills: Proficiency with design tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD)
Understanding of UX principles and design thinking
Familiarity with design systems and component-based design

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
Professional development and design conference attendance
